[[ ## text ## ]]
Compared with Torch and several alternatives, PyTorch uses memory with remarkable efficiency. To that end, we built custom GPU memory allocators so deep-learning models make the fullest possible use of available capacity. Thus, you may train larger models than heretofore, without squandering precious GPU memory.

Respond with the corresponding output fields, starting with the field `[[ ## reasoning ## ]]`, then `[[ ## is_ai ## ]]` (must be formatted as a valid Python bool), and then ending with the marker for `[[ ## completed ## ]]`.

message.content:
[[ ## reasoning ## ]]
The passage has a polished, promotional tone and uses somewhat formulaic phrasing such as “make the fullest possible use” and “without squandering precious GPU memory.” Its wording also feels like an AI-generated paraphrase of technical marketing copy, particularly the unusual use of “heretofore.” Therefore, it is likely AI-generated.
[[ ## is_ai ## ]]
True
[[ ## completed ## ]]
